sections.title: Position Eligibility

items.label: Games needed from previous season for a player to qualify at a specific hitting position
Games needed from current season for a player to qualify at a specific hitting position
Starts needed from previous season for a player to qualify as a Starting Pitcher
Starts needed from current season for a player to qualify as a Starting Pitcher
Relief appearances needed from previous season for a player to qualify as a Relief Pitcher
Relief appearances needed from current season for a player to qualify as a Relief Pitcher
Use Fantrax's default position(s) in addition to any position(s) a player qualifies for based on above criteria
Note
items.value: If a player does not qualify for any positions based on the above selections, he will qualify at the position(s) played most in the previous MLB season. If he did not play at all last season, then his default position, plus any other positions in the system, will be used.

items.label: Use Fantrax's default position(s) in addition to any position(s) a player qualifies for based on above criteria
Note
items.value: If a player does not qualify for any positions based on the above selections, he will qualify at the position(s) played most in the previous MLB season. If he did not play at all last season, then his default position, plus any other positions in the system, will be used.

sections.body_text:
Games needed from previous season for a player to qualify at a specific hitting position: 20
Games needed from current season for a player to qualify at a specific hitting position: 10
Starts needed from previous season for a player to qualify as a Starting Pitcher: 5
Starts needed from current season for a player to qualify as a Starting Pitcher: 3
Relief appearances needed from previous season for a player to qualify as a Relief Pitcher: 8
Relief appearances needed from current season for a player to qualify as a Relief Pitcher: 5
Use Fantrax's default position(s) in addition to any position(s) a player qualifies for based on above criteria: Yes
Note: If a player does not qualify for any positions based on the above selections, he will qualify at the position(s) played most in the previous MLB season. If he did not play at all last season, then his default position, plus any other positions in the system, will be used.
sections.summary: Hitters qualify at 20 previous-season or 10 current-season games; pitchers use 5/3 starts for SP and 8/5 appearances for RP.

sections.title: Scoring

items.label: If a maximum has been met or exceeded
If a minimum has not been met by end of season
items.value: All averaged hitting stats (e.g., Avg, Slg, etc.) or pitching stats (e.g., ERA, WHIP, etc.), depending on the scoring category whose minimum has not been met, are lost for the entire season, and standings are adjusted accordingly.

items.label: Prorate Min/Max according to period length
Players will accumulate all stats in all scoring category groups
Stat Correction Handling
items.value: No Official Scoring changes will affect your league beyond the default stat freeze time. Official corrections will be applied to your league if they come in within 7 days (168 hours) after the end of that game. Any Official Scoring changes which come in after this time will not be reflected in your league stats/scores and standings.

If a maximum has been met or exceeded: Do nothing.
If a minimum has not been met by end of season: All averaged hitting stats (e.g., Avg, Slg, etc.) or pitching stats (e.g., ERA, WHIP, etc.), depending on the scoring category whose minimum has not been met, are lost for the entire season, and standings are adjusted accordingly.
Prorate Min/Max according to period length: Yes
Other Scoring Preferences
Players will accumulate all stats in all scoring category groups: No
Stat Correction Handling: No Official Scoring changes will affect your league beyond the default stat freeze time. Official corrections will be applied to your league if they come in within 7 days (168 hours) after the end of that game. Any Official Scoring changes which come in after this time will not be reflected in your league stats/scores and standings.

sections.body_text:
Lineups
Lineup Change System: Managers enter lineup changes
Lineup changes are executed: Daily
Lineups will become locked 0:05 (hours:minutes) before scheduled start-time of game
Trades
Trade System: Managers propose their own trades
Trading Period: All Year
Maximum Trades per Team: Unlimited
Trade Deadline Date: Mon Aug 3, 2026 10:59 PM CDT
Trade Voting System: None
Allow trading of claim budget: No
Allow trading of salary cap space: No
Allow trading of draft Picks: Yes
• Number of future years for draft pick trading: 3
• Number of rounds available for draft pick trading: 5
Claims/Drops
Claim/Drop System: Managers perform their own claims & drops
Max # of claims per season: Unlimited
Max # of claims per week: Unlimited
Use Waiver Wire process: Yes
Allow claims/drops before the draft: Yes
Allow drops during draft: Yes
Can't drop list: Fantrax
Pending claims/drops are viewable by: One's own team
Failed claims/drops viewable by: One's own team
Free Agents
Free Agent Claim System: Free for all (1st come 1st serve)
Waiver Wire
Waiver Wire claim system: Automated Priority Order
Rotate Waiver Wire Claim Order After Each Claim: Yes
Waiver Wire players are processed: After a selected # of Days
# of days players remain on waivers for: 2
Change to bulk waiver process time if player playing: No
Bypass Waivers for new pool entrants: No
Ensure 23+ hour waiver period: Yes
Prevent Waiver "Churning": Yes
sections.summary: Managers set daily lineups, trade year-round, and use automated waiver priority. Standard waivers run for 2 days. The current trade deadline is Mon Aug 3, 2026 10:59 PM CDT.

sections.title: League Constitution

items.label: Draft-order logic
items.value: Document the method used to set each season's order, not just the order Fantrax currently stores.

items.label: Financial rules
items.value: Track buy-in, payout split, and any side pots or penalties that Fantrax does not capture.

items.label: Voting rules
items.value: Keep rule-change thresholds and offseason vote procedures in one place.

blocks.title: Commissioner Checklist
items: Record any rule that matters to league operations but does not appear in the Fantrax export.
Update this file when the league votes on offseason changes so the site stays aligned with actual policy.
Prefer plain language over copied platform text when documenting constitutional rules.

sections.body_text:
What Belongs Here
Draft-order logic: Document the method used to set each season's order, not just the order Fantrax currently stores.
Financial rules: Track buy-in, payout split, and any side pots or penalties that Fantrax does not capture.
Voting rules: Keep rule-change thresholds and offseason vote procedures in one place.
Commissioner Checklist
Record any rule that matters to league operations but does not appear in the Fantrax export.
Update this file when the league votes on offseason changes so the site stays aligned with actual policy.
Prefer plain language over copied platform text when documenting constitutional rules.
sections.summary: Offline policies that do not naturally fit inside the Fantrax export live here and can be versioned alongside the platform settings.

sections.title: Documented Offline Context

items.label: Draft-order presentation
items.value: Fantrax stores the live order each year, but the reason that order was chosen should live in the constitution.

items.label: Tradeable draft picks
items.value: The league allows draft-pick trading up to three future years across five rounds.

items.label: Payout visibility
items.value: The Fantrax export says prizes are not configured, so any real-world payout structure should be documented here instead.

sections.body_text:
Current Context
Draft-order presentation: Fantrax stores the live order each year, but the reason that order was chosen should live in the constitution.
Tradeable draft picks: The league allows draft-pick trading up to three future years across five rounds.
Payout visibility: The Fantrax export says prizes are not configured, so any real-world payout structure should be documented here instead.
sections.summary: These are the league-specific items the repo already hints at but Fantrax alone does not explain well.
